_comment: Seed snapshot of WhoIsThere BUNDLED content (baked into the app). Import once into the admin's catalog, then keep isActive in sync via content_manifest/places_v1. To hide a whole topic use the manifest's top-level topicsActive map (categoryId -> bool). 'remote' places (added by admin, image in Storage) are appended on top of these. 'category' is the GAME category id (= source filename), NOT the per-item sub-type. Regenerate from the game repo when bundled content changes.
